title: Robin Leads Cobra Below
description: On pages 8, 9, 10, 11, this part focuses on luffy breaks crocodile’s scheme. The final struggle beneath Alabasta turns against Crocodile as Luffy keeps fighting and Robin forces Cobra toward the hidden history Crocodile wants.
scene: This scene belongs to the Luffy Breaks Crocodile’s Scheme sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Crocodile, Nico Robin, King Cobra, Luffy, Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: The true power behind my sand abilities,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Trees... Rocks... And even the very soil!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: every- thing on earth returns to sand!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Even the statue's turning to sand...!

summary: The final struggle beneath Alabasta turns against Crocodile as Luffy keeps fighting and Robin forces Cobra toward the hidden history Crocodile wants.
